overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Ravenclaw Common Room from Hogwarts Legacy, showcasing gothic architecture with stone archways, a massive eagle statue, spiral staircases, and a circular common room with an astronomical ceiling. The player character ascends from the entrance through various levels of the tower, passing other students and detailed interior elements like fireplaces, bookshelves, and study areas.

events.description: passing through stone archway into the eagle statue chamber
beginning ascent of the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs toward the eagle statue and entering the spiral staircase

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes standing before the eagle statue

entered.detail: wide wooden stairs with dark railings leading up to the doorway
large wooden door with an eagle emblem above it
arched stone passage leading into the inner chamber
massive stone eagle sculpture with outstretched wings on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the wooden entrance stairs of the Ravenclaw tower, moving through a stone archway into a chamber dominated by a massive eagle statue. Two students stand before the statue as the camera approaches and begins ascending into the spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase with blue carpet

events.description: passing close by a student descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved stone staircase with ornate blue carpet

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the spiral staircase

entered.detail: spiral staircase with grey stone walls and blue carpeted steps
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned glass letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: Ascending the curved stone spiral staircase with blue carpet, passing gothic windows that cast natural light onto the stone walls. A student descends from above, passing by closely as the camera continues upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular common room with astronomical ceiling

events.description: exiting the narrow staircase into the grand circular common room
moving from dimmer stairwell into brightly lit space with large windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand common room admiring the high ceilings and architecture

entered.detail: large circular room with high vaulted ceilings and wooden beams
domed ceiling painted with stars and constellations on deep blue background
ornate blue carpet with astronomical symbols and bronze accents
floor-to-ceiling arched windows with lattice patterns flooding the room with light
ornate dark wood railing with gothic tracery patterns

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase into the magnificent circular common room with its astronomical domed ceiling and tall gothic windows. The camera moves across the ornate blue carpet, revealing the spacious interior with wooden balcony railings and scattered furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room lounge with fireplace and study areas

events.description: approaching the central fireplace with burning fire
passing close by a student sitting in an armchair

agents.ego_description: exploring the lounge area, examining the fireplace, bookshelves, and study spaces

notable_agents.action: student sitting in green armchair reading a book

entered.detail: large circular stone fireplace with wooden mantel and burning fire
large blue wall hanging with white eagle embroidery
tall wooden bookcases filled with books reaching to the ceiling
wooden desks with quills, ink bottles, and scattered papers
polished wooden floorboards with circular rug patterns

segments.scene_description: Moving through the lounge area toward the central fireplace, passing by a student reading in an armchair. The camera circles the fireplace, revealing the eagle tapestry, extensive bookshelves, and detailed study desks with magical implements before heading toward the upper staircase.

events.description: beginning ascent of the wooden stairs to the upper level
reaching the upper landing and entering the dormitory area

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase to the upper dormitory level

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with carved railings and wainscoting
upper floor landing with access to dormitory rooms

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wooden staircase away from the common room, moving through a narrower passage with carved wood paneling. The camera reaches the upper landing, transitioning into the dormitory area with notice boards visible on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from the stone entrance of the Ravenclaw tower into the expansive, celestial heights of the common room and beyond. It begins by passing through a stone archway and a chamber dominated by a massive eagle statue before the camera turns upward into a curved spiral staircase. As the camera climbs the blue-carpeted stairs past gothic windows and descending students, the narrow stone corridor opens into a magnificent circular common room featuring an astronomical domed ceiling. The movement then flows across the ornate lounge, circling a central fireplace and passing study desks and bookshelves before shifting toward a wooden staircase. Finally, the camera ascends away from the main hall through a narrow, wood-paneled passage to reach the upper landing of the dormitory area.
